name: Cheeseburger Pie
recipeInstructions:
Heat the oven to 375 degrees F.
Mix the biscuit baking mix and milk until a soft dough forms.
Gently shape the dough into a ball on a floured surface after kneading it 5 times.
Roll out the dough to be larger than an inverted 9-inch pie pan.
Place in the pan and flute the edges. Set aside.
Cook and stir ground beef and chopped onion in a large skillet until the meat is brown.
Drain off excess fat.
Stir in salt, pepper, 2 tablespoons of biscuit mix, and Worcestershire sauce.
Turn the meat filling into the pastry-lined pie pan.
Arrange tomato slices on the meat mixture.
Beat eggs slightly and stir in cheese. Spoon over the tomatoes to cover completely.
Bake for about 30 minutes. Cut into wedges and serve with chili sauce if desired.
